response:
Subject: Farewell and Thank You

Dear team, I’m writing to let you know that my time here has come to an end, and I’m truly grateful for the support and collaboration we’ve shared. I’ve learned so much from each of you, and I’ll always appreciate the camaraderie and hard work that made our projects successful. While I’m excited for my next chapter, I’ll miss the daily interactions and the positive energy you all bring. Please stay in touch—you can reach me on LinkedIn or at my personal email. Wishing you continued success and looking forward to crossing paths again in the future.
